name: Outlaws
overview: Set in the lush but lawless land on the border between Lesotho and KwaZulu-Natal, Outlaws is the story of two families at war with each other: the Zulu, cattle-farming Biyela clan and the Basotho, cattle-raiding Tseoles.

trailers.title: Love and war | Outlaws launch trailer | Showmax Original
